posts.author: mohitmehra
posts.text: What Went Wrong With the Jio IPO? — Perhaps only a fresh issue is good from a USDINR perspective. Bharti Airtel is at a 120 billion USD valuation. If Jio Platforms is at that number or at a slight premium, then this OFS alone would have been about 3-4 billion USD of outgo. For context, the total FPI selling in April was 6.5 billion USD.

posts.text: What Went Wrong With the Jio IPO? — What you think, will it go for OFS or a fresh issue?

posts.text: What Went Wrong With the Jio IPO? — Even I was wondering, why the delay in the JIO IPO ? then I learned that Companies like Facebook owns significant portion in JIO and doesn’t want to sell their part of the ownership stake to the public. image 924×364 49.8 KB

posts.author: Sankalp
posts.text: What Went Wrong With the Jio IPO? — I saw a tweet where it was shown how new x accounts with 0 followings & activity are used to post on JIO IPO. I’m not seeing the tweet now. They are just marketing aggressive in X, just creating a buzz before the launch.

posts.text: What Went Wrong With the Jio IPO? — Is it the weak IPO market sentiment or the higher valuation expectations that are delaying the much-awaited Jio IPO?
